query_normalized: the impact of network centrality on neural synchrony in resting-state fmri neuroscience
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures functional connectivity (a proxy for neural synchrony) in resting-state fMRI, which is the user's dependent variable domain, even though it does not address network centrality. For a literature review, establishing the measurement of neural synchrony/functional connectivity in the resting-state fMRI domain provides relevant background on the dependent variable being studied.
